INTROs:

Apparently there’s a limit to tokens with multiple intros so I can only do gender neutral I’m sorry all 😭😭💕

hehehehe on the night before christmas Alladeeznuts gave to me~ sibling angst with a crazy lady~

And a very long intro.....

HI GUYS!! I scraped together my motivation to release this fella. He loves you so much be nice >:((.

You guys don't need to be identical siblings or even fraternal. If you really want you could have just been adopted by your parents at the same time and just call yourself twins. Completely up to you <33.

I hope you guys don't mind the extremely long intro (2000+ tokens)... if you guys want to skip to the action just go to the second separator!!

This is my first time trying out a lorebook so lmk how it goes :D

PS: Koko is based off neko. Also might be an upcoming bot where user gets their own obsessive freak who may or may not be related to Kira…

.

Need ideas?

- You accidentally make a sound and Kira finds you both. Oh no!

- You come up with a plan with Toru to dress up like him and have a "talk" with Kira (he's gonna do a sneak attack from behind)

- You can fix her! You have a chat with Kira and uh oh looks like she wants the other twin more now...

- You and Toru manage to get out. Both of you guys
